# Required output
1) Extension command architecture
2) API/auth/storage approach

detailMarkdown:
# Raycast Extension Dev Publish Capability Pack Skill

Expert Raycast extension capability skill for command design, extension architecture, testing, and store-ready publication workflows.

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/raycast-extension-dev-publish-capability-pack.zip -o raycast-extension-dev-publish-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o raycast-extension-dev-publish-capability-pack.zip -d ./raycast-extension-dev-publish-capability-pack
```

## Usage
Use this skill to build and ship Raycast extensions that are reliable, polished, and publish-ready.
